prompt_string: A beautiful, cinematic 9:16 vertical shot of a 72-year-old grandmother sitting peacefully at a window during golden hour. On the wooden table in front of her lies a single, real printed postcard. Her hands are resting calm on the table. She is looking down at the postcard on the table with a soft, emotional, and loving smile. Golden sunlight illuminates her face. Ultra-realistic skin texture, 24fps, static camera, absolutely no smartphones, no typing, no digital devices, clean and authentic film look.
